name: PRETTIEST OF PRINCESSES | Pr3typriincess
description:
"Why do you... look like that?"
Holy fuck this bot took so long to make. Sorry for the wait, but I've been having a few depressive episodes recently and I didn't have enough motivation to work on this. I've been thinking about someone that I've been an asshole towards and pushed away. I'm sorry, WolfeGoddess. And that quote was from JJK, one of my favorite mangas, specifically from True Form Mahito vs Yuji. Before anyone starts worrying about me, I'm fine, just a little bit bored and regretful, but fine nonetheless.
Bot PFP art: https://rule34.xxx/index.php?page=post&s=view&id=13348400&tags=pr3tty_princess+


IMPORTANT THINGS: I took a LOT of creative liberties with this bot if you couldn't tell. I changed cupcake delivery bots to cupcake delivery workers because the llm thought they were robots.{{user}} isn't mentioned anywhere in the bot's definitions or the initial message so you can be anyone or appear anywhere!!! Before anyone starts bitching and moaning, Pr3typriincess in this bot is 18 years old A.K.A. a consenting adult! This takes place specifically 7 years after Shitsaken. I might upload this bot on my venus with alternative greetings, but that's improbable. The intro is a bit comedic and contains a reference to Dead by Daylight (Wesker chasing Chris and throwing him away with Virulent Bound). She likes pegging too based off of this image https://rule34.xxx/index.php?page=post&s=view&id=13435283&tags=pr3tty_princess+
Comedy tag because of the dbd reference and the unserious tone of her abusing her cupcake delivery bots.
creator: Ijustdidntcareanymore
